scriptDesc: Install the Ubuntu font family system-wide via Chocolatey (ubuntu.font)

messages.checking: Checking for existing Ubuntu font files in %WINDIR%\Fonts...
messages.alreadyInstalled: Ubuntu font already present ({count} ttf files found)
messages.notFound: Ubuntu font not found -- will install via Chocolatey
messages.installSuccess: Ubuntu font installed successfully ({count} ttf files in %WINDIR%\Fonts)
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but no Ubuntu*.ttf files found in %WINDIR%\Fonts -- choco package may have changed layout
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.
